_comment: Copy this file to appsettings.Local.json (git-ignored) and fill in real values. The API loads it on startup and bakes it into the Docker image at build time.

Payments._comment: The Bill Splitter owner's PUBLIC pay-me handles (a single global set). Fill in your real handles here (this file is git-ignored); in prod they come from AWS SSM via Payments__CashApp / Payments__PayPal / Payments__Venmo. Any blank handle hides that link.
